{"id":"project-LICHEN-ryc3","title":"ForwardingEntry/Buffer: no validation of source_iid length","description":"File: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py:89, 167

ForwardingEntry stores `source_iid: bytes` and ForwardingBuffer.try_buffer accepts it without validation:

```python
@dataclass
class ForwardingEntry:
    source_iid: bytes  # No length check
    ...

def try_buffer(self, ..., source_iid: bytes, ...):
    # No validation that len(source_iid) == 8
```

WHY IT'S A BUG: IPv6 Interface Identifiers are exactly 8 bytes. Accepting arbitrary-length bytes could cause:
1. Dict key collisions if truncated IIDs are used elsewhere
2. Inconsistent behavior when comparing/logging IIDs
3. Memory waste with oversized IIDs

Similarly for DtnMessage.destination_iid at line 124.

IMPACT: Protocol non-compliance; potential for key collision attacks if an attacker can inject IIDs of varying lengths that hash to same bucket.

FIX: Add validation in __post_init__ or at entry points:
```python
if len(source_iid) != 8:
    raise ValueError(f"source_iid must be 8 bytes, got {len(source_iid)}")
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:55.021363Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:55.021398Z"}

2. Inconsistent behavior when comparing/logging IIDs
3. Memory waste with oversized IIDs

Similarly for DtnMessage.destination_iid at line 124.

FIX: Add validation in __post_init__ or at entry points:
```python

    raise ValueError(f"source_iid must be 8 bytes, got {len(source_iid)}")
```","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:55.021363Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:30:08.379068207Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:30:08.379068207Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:35:08.379068207Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:30:08.379068207Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: dffdeb0bd - resolved merge conflict and added IID length validation for ForwardingEntry and DtnMessage"}
